sections.title: If the player has never paid Ferox to switch their respawn point

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Welcome wanderer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: You're surrounded by a relic of a long lost kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened here?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Oh, I couldn't really tell you that.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: This place has sat in ruin for an age, slowly destroyed by the harsh climate of the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it's a ruin, what's the point in being here?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: I search for knowledge. I want to know what happened to this part of the world.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Whilst looking for answers, I slowly turned this broken town into a safe haven for travellers. Welcome to Ferox Enclave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quite a dangerous place for a town, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: It is, but that's why it's needed! Look around, you can see how many others share my opinion.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: You'll find yourself quite safe inside my enclave - the protective barriers should keep any troublemakers out.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: I will warn you though, if you've had Teleblock cast upon you, I will not allow you back into the Enclave. You'd be a danger to the others gathered here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information! I'll take a look around.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Tread carefully my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do for me?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Well, if you'd like, I can make it so you respawn in our Enclave. It'll put you right in the heart of all the chaos that surrounds us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: This is how it'll work: When you die, you'll respawn right here in Ferox Enclave, just outside the pub we've set up. You will lose your items as normal of course.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: I won't be able to do anything if you die somewhere like Castle Wars or the Emir's Arena; they have their own magic to keep you safe.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: It'll cost you though! Transporting you here is no easy task. 5 million coins should do it, that'd be a one time fee of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much money on me.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Understandable, you'd have to be a brave [man/woman] to be carrying that much gold out here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, switch my respawn to Ferox Enclave.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Thank you, you'll respawn in the Enclave from here on out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Can't say I blame you, this wouldn't be my choice either.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't interest me.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Come find me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: So be it.

sections.title: If the player has paid Ferox to switch their respawn point before

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Welcome wanderer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I talk to you about my respawn location?

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Would you like to respawn back in Ferox Enclave again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please switch my respawn back to the Enclave.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: The Wilderness takes a toll on a [man's/woman's] soul. Are you sure you can handle it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, switch my respawn to the Enclave.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Fair enough, it has been done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Understandable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't want to respawn in the Enclave.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Understandable.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: How are you finding our sanctuary?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please switch my respawn back to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Can't say I blame you, the Wilderness starts to wear down the soul after a while.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: But are you sure? Come and see me if you want to respawn in our Enclave again; I won't need any more money from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, switch my respawn to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll keep the Enclave respawn.

lines.speaker: Ferox
lines.text: Fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's working for me so far, thanks.
